title: FMT1 modifier stripping in key.rs::verify is correct and well-documented
description: The FMT1_MODIFIER_MASK logic (0x0F40) correctly implements TPM 2.0 Part 2 §6.6.3 for mapping modifier-tagged TPM_RC_SIGNATURE codes (e.g. 0x01DB for param_1) back to the base code 0x009B. The discriminant condition (bit 7 set AND bits 15:12 clear) correctly excludes VER1 codes (bit 7 clear), WARN codes (bit 7 clear), and wolfTPM internal codes (bits 15:12 set as negative i32). The comment explains why 'bit 8 clear' would be wrong. A future contributor should not simplify this to a direct comparison against 0x009B without stripping, or it will miss FMT1-qualified returns.
